jobs.name: Self-Healing Watchdog (Auto-Fix)
jobs.description: Auto-detects and fixes: stale token, broken config, disk pressure. Runs daily at 08:30 IST including weekends/holidays.

jobs.name: Data Source Health Check (Pre-Market)
jobs.description: Probes all data sources (NSE, bhavcopy, nsepython, jugaad, yfinance). Saves state/datasource_health.json.

jobs.name: Dashboard Endpoint Coverage Proof
jobs.description: Probes all dashboard API endpoints, writes coverage report to reports/latest/dashboard_endpoint_coverage/

jobs.name: Full Auto Coordinator (Pre-Market)
jobs.description: Morning proof refresh before market open.

jobs.name: Dhan Instrument Master Sync
jobs.description: Download official Dhan scrip master CSV and rebuild runtime cache

jobs.name: Daily Gain Rank (Pre-Market)
jobs.description: Ranks all tracked underlyings by predicted gain potential at market open

jobs.name: Analyzer Paper Lifecycle Proof
jobs.description: Runs analyzer/paper lifecycle proof on market days.

jobs.name: UI Market Cross Verify
jobs.description: Cross-verify cloud UI APIs vs IST market session

jobs.name: Daily Gain Validate (Post-Market)
jobs.description: Validates predictions vs NSE actual results, saves OI snapshot for next session

jobs.name: Daily Accuracy Trend (Post-Market)
jobs.description: Prints 14-day accuracy trend, fires retrain signal if Spearman rho < 0.40 for 3 days

jobs.name: Daily Prediction-vs-Actual Benchmark (Issue #26)
jobs.description: Writes reports/latest/performance_benchmark/{prediction_vs_actual.csv, top_mover_match.csv, missed_opportunities.md, benchmark_summary.md} + archived copy under reports/archive/performance_benchmark/YYYYMMDD/, per GitHub issue #26. Skips with explicit notice if daily_gain_validate did not succeed for today first.

jobs.name: Dashboard Browser Proof (Playwright)
jobs.description: Runs Playwright against the live /ui — screenshots Overview/Trade/Positions/Broker/Performance/Alerts/System/Gates, checks for raw Vue tokens, 'coming next iteration', stuck-loading text, and presence of PAPER/LIVE OFF. Writes reports/latest/dashboard_browser_proof/status.json, which paper_day_proof_pack (16:15) reads for its item 6.

jobs.name: Post-Market Auto Pipeline
jobs.description: After validation: friction expectancy, model-to-trade gap, gate sync, blocker scan

jobs.name: Paper Day Proof Pack (Human-Requested 14-Point Checklist)
jobs.description: Assembles PAPER_DAY_PROOF_PASS/FAIL artifact: deploy SHA, live health/broker/scheduler APIs, worker thread evidence, UI placeholder scan, job status for gain_rank/lifecycle_proof/validate/benchmark, alert reconciliation, secret-leak scan. Runs after daily_prediction_benchmark (15:45) and system3_post_market_pipeline (15:50) so their outputs exist to check.

jobs.name: Auto Model Retrain (Post-Market)
jobs.description: Reads state/retrain_signal.json; if present, retrains ensemble_predictor models and clears signal

jobs.name: Full Auto Coordinator (Post-Market)
jobs.description: Evening proof refresh after validation and friction reports.

jobs.name: NSE FO Bhavcopy Download (Post-Market)
jobs.description: Downloads NSE F&O bhavcopy EOD archive after market close.

jobs.name: Signal Engine - Bhavcopy Runner (Post-Market)
jobs.description: Transforms bhavcopy into option chain snapshot, runs signal engine.

jobs.name: Weekly Repo Authority Audit (Issue #28)
jobs.description: Weekly scan for duplicate/orphan modules vs declared authoritative entrypoints. Writes reports/latest/repo_authority/.
